selection_strategy: One highest-confidence correct prediction per class and one highest-confidence incorrect prediction per actual class when available.
aggregation_method: Signed sum across embedding dimensions for direction, and sum of absolute SHAP values across embedding dimensions for importance.
interpretation_note: Positive signed SHAP values support the predicted class. Negative values reduce the predicted class score. Because SHAP is calculated at the embedding level, token contributions are approximate aggregated attributions.
